name: Power Platform CLI (pac)
description: Installs the Microsoft Power Platform CLI (pac). When version is 'latest', auto-updates on every container start via postStartCommand.

version.description: Version of the Power Platform CLI to install. Use 'latest' for auto-updates on each start.

github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr.text: This dev container includes the Power Platform CLI (`pac`), which is pre-installed and available on the `PATH`. Use `pac auth create`, `pac solution`, `pac pcf`, `pac plugin`, and other pac commands for Power Platform development.
